annotation_target.structure: Third period consequent — ornamented resolution, descending close
teaching_goals: ornaments on the resolution should feel like a sigh
the tonic arrival is soft and complete

teaching_notes.note: Ornamented tonic arrival — the decoration softens the landing.
technique: light ornament, full melodic tone on the resolution note

target_trace.objective: Read mm. 29–32 of Nocturne in Eb Major, Op. 9 No. 2 (continuation of mm. 25–28), analyze the musical continuation, play in a loop.

session.content: Play measures 29–32 and describe how this phrase resolves.
Let me view the piano roll for mm. 29–32.
Measures 29–32 complete this phrase with a decorated resolution. The ornamental detail continues while the melody descends toward the tonic. Let me loop mm. 29–32.
Chopin Nocturne mm. 29–32: ornamented resolution, melody descends to tonic. Pairs with mm. 25–28.

eval_metadata.split_strategy: stratified by (composer, composition_id) with MIDI byte-hash dedup
